subcodes.first_line: O My Leaf! Upon thee be My glory! The Tree casteth upon thee from the verses of thy Lord, and I am verily the All-Knowing, the All-Remembering [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ورقتی علیک بهائی ان السدره تلقی علیک من آیات ربک و انا الذاکر العلیم و
subcodes.subjects: @power of prayer, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @personal instructions, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @praise and encouragement
